name: Eddie Griffin
blurb: He broke through on HBO's Def Comedy Jam and One Night Stand in the early 1990s and later headlined the sitcom Malcolm and Eddie and films including Undercover Brother and the Deuce Bigalow series.
bio: Eddie Griffin is an American stand-up comedian and actor known for high-energy, improvisational, frank comedy about Black culture, sex, race, and politics. He broke through on HBO's Def Comedy Jam and One Night Stand in the early 1990s and later headlined the sitcom Malcolm and Eddie and films including Undercover Brother and the Deuce Bigalow series. Comedy Central ranked him among its 100 Greatest Stand-Ups of All Time.

timeline.ev: Performs first stand-up set on a bet and earns a standing ovation
Appears on HBO's One Night Stand and Def Comedy Jam
Begins starring role on the sitcom Malcolm and Eddie
Releases the HBO special Voodoo Child
Stars as the title character in Undercover Brother

accolades: Ranked number 62 on Comedy Central's 100 Greatest Stand-Ups of All Time
Cable ACE Award nomination for the HBO special One Night Stand (1992)
Headlined HBO specials including Voodoo Child and Dysfunktional Family

specials.t: You Can Tell Em I Said It
